# fix_plan.md ÔÇö ISO Audit Manager

## Task Tags

- `[SETUP]` ÔÇö Infrastructure, config, scaffolding (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[IFACE]` ÔÇö Interface definition + stub (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[TEST]` ÔÇö Test suite from spec (verify: `make check-no-test`)

1ÔåÆ# 02 - Layout, Header und Navigation
     2ÔåÆ
     3ÔåÆ## Datenmodell
     4ÔåÆ
     5ÔåÆ```typescript
     6ÔåÆinterface NavItem {
     7ÔåÆ	id: string;
     8ÔåÆ	label: string; // i18n-Schluessel, z.B. "nav.uebersicht"
     9ÔåÆ	icon: string; // Emoji oder Icon-Bezeichner
    10ÔåÆ	href: string; // SvelteKit-Route, z.B. "/overview"
    11ÔåÆ}
    12ÔåÆ
    13ÔåÆinterface SettingsState {
    14ÔåÆ	isOpen: boolean; // Modal sichtbar
    15ÔåÆ	language: SupportedLocale;
    16ÔåÆ	theme: 'light' | 'dark'; // Falls spaeter gewuenscht
    17ÔåÆ}
    18ÔåÆ
    19ÔåÆ// Navigationspunkte (12 Eintraege)
    20ÔåÆconst NAV_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
    21ÔåÆ	{ id: 'overview', label: 'nav.uebersicht', icon: '­ƒôï', href: '/overview' },
    22ÔåÆ	{ id: 'dashboard', label: 'nav.dashboard', icon: '­ƒôè', href: '/dashboard' },
    23ÔåÆ	{ id: 'auditor-management', label: 'nav.auditoren', icon: '­ƒæÑ', href: '/auditor-management' },
    24ÔåÆ	{ id: 'add-auditor', label: 'nav.auditor_neu', icon: 'Ô×ò', href: '/add-auditor' },
    25ÔåÆ	{ id: 'search-manage', label: 'nav.suchen', icon: '­ƒöì', href: '/search-manage' },
    26ÔåÆ	{ id: 'calendar', label: 'nav.kalender', icon: '­ƒôà', href: '/calendar' },
    27ÔåÆ	{ id: 'import-export', label: 'nav.import_export', icon: '­ƒôü', href: '/import-export' },
    28ÔåÆ	{ id: 'plan-generator', label: 'nav.auditplan', icon: '­ƒôØ', href: '/plan-generator' },
    29ÔåÆ	{ id: 'report-generator', label: 'nav.auditbericht', icon: '­ƒôä', href: '/report-generator' },
    30ÔåÆ	{ id: 'notes-generator', label: 'nav.auditnotizen', icon: '­ƒùÆ´©Å', href: '/notes-generator' },
    31ÔåÆ	{ id: 'audit-questions', label: 'nav.fragen_dokumente', icon: 'ÔØô', href: '/audit-questions' },
    32ÔåÆ	{ id: 'action-plan', label: 'nav.massnahmenplan', icon: 'ÔÜí', href: '/action-plan' }
    33ÔåÆ];
    34ÔåÆ```
    35ÔåÆ
    36ÔåÆ## UI-Beschreibung
    37ÔåÆ
    38ÔåÆ### Header
    39ÔåÆ
    40ÔåÆ**Datei:** `src/lib/components/layout/Header.svelte`
    41ÔåÆ
    42ÔåÆDer Header ist ein festes Element am oberen Rand der Seite mit einem Verlaufshintergrund.
    43ÔåÆ
    44ÔåÆ| Eigenschaft | Wert                                      |
    45ÔåÆ| ----------- | ----------------------------------------- |
    46ÔåÆ| Hintergrund | Linearer Gradient: `#667eea` -> `#764ba2` |
    47ÔåÆ| Hoehe       | Automatisch (abhaengig vom Inhalt)        |
    48ÔåÆ| Padding     | `1.5rem 2rem`                             |
    49ÔåÆ| Position    | Relativ (scrollt mit der Seite)           |
    50ÔåÆ
    51ÔåÆ**3 Elemente im Header (Flexbox, `justify-between`, `align-center`):**
    52ÔåÆ
    53ÔåÆ#### 1. Linkes SVG - ISO-Zertifikat mit Lupe
    54ÔåÆ
    55ÔåÆ- Groesse: `280x250px`
    56ÔåÆ- Darstellung: 3D-ISO-Zertifikat mit einer Lupe darueber
    57ÔåÆ- Techniken: SVG-Gradienten (`linearGradient`), Filter (`feDropShadow`, `feGaussianBlur`), abgerundete Rechtecke
    58ÔåÆ- Farben: Weiss/Grau fuer das Dokument, Blau/Lila fuer Akzente, Gold fuer die Lupe
    59ÔåÆ- Animation: Keine (statisches SVG)
    60ÔåÆ
    61ÔåÆ#### 2. Mittlerer Bereich - Titel
    62ÔåÆ
    63ÔåÆ- **Haupttitel:** `<h1>` mit Text "Der ISO Audit Manager"
    64ÔåÆ  - Schriftgroesse: `2.5rem`
    65ÔåÆ  - Farbe: Weiss
    66ÔåÆ  - Text-Shadow: 3D-Effekt mit mehreren Schatten-Ebenen (`2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)`)
    67ÔåÆ  - Schriftstil: Fett (bold)
    68ÔåÆ- **Untertitel 1:** Beschreibungstext mit Perspektiv-Effekt
    69ÔåÆ  - Schriftgroesse: `1.1rem`
    70ÔåÆ  - Farbe: `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)`
    71ÔåÆ  - Leichter `perspective`-CSS-Effekt
    72ÔåÆ- **Untertitel 2:** Zweiter Beschreibungstext mit alternativem Perspektiv-Winkel
    73ÔåÆ  - Gleiche Formatierung wie Untertitel 1
    74ÔåÆ
    75ÔåÆ#### 3. Rechtes SVG - Klemmbrett mit Fortschrittsbalken
    76ÔåÆ
    77ÔåÆ- Groesse: `280x250px`
    78ÔåÆ- Darstellung: 3D-Klemmbrett mit ISO-Fortschrittsbalken, Auditor-Team-Symbolen und Kalender-Icon
    79ÔåÆ- Techniken: SVG-Gradienten, Filter, Rechtecke mit abgerundeten Ecken
    80ÔåÆ- Fortschrittsbalken: Verschiedene Fuellstaende fuer unterschiedliche ISO-Normen

1ÔåÆ// drizzle schema
     2ÔåÆimport { relations, sql } from 'drizzle-orm';
     3ÔåÆimport { sqliteTable, text, integer, index } from 'drizzle-orm/sqlite-core';
     4ÔåÆ
     5ÔåÆexport const user = sqliteTable('user', {
     6ÔåÆ	id: text('id').primaryKey(),
     7ÔåÆ	name: text('name').notNull(),
     8ÔåÆ	email: text('email').notNull().unique(),
     9ÔåÆ	emailVerified: integer('email_verified', { mode: 'boolean' }).default(false).notNull(),
    10ÔåÆ	image: text('image'),
    11ÔåÆ	createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    12ÔåÆ		.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    13ÔåÆ		.notNull(),
    14ÔåÆ	updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    15ÔåÆ		.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    16ÔåÆ		.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    17ÔåÆ		.notNull()
    18ÔåÆ});
    19ÔåÆ
    20ÔåÆexport const session = sqliteTable(
    21ÔåÆ	'session',
    22ÔåÆ	{
    23ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    24ÔåÆ		expiresAt: integer('expires_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' }).notNull(),
    25ÔåÆ		token: text('token').notNull().unique(),
    26ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    27ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    28ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    29ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    30ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    31ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    32ÔåÆ		ipAddress: text('ip_address'),
    33ÔåÆ		userAgent: text('user_agent'),
    34ÔåÆ		userId: text('user_id')
    35ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    36ÔåÆ			.references(() => user.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' })
    37ÔåÆ	},
    38ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('session_userId_idx').on(table.userId)]
    39ÔåÆ);
    40ÔåÆ
    41ÔåÆexport const account = sqliteTable(
    42ÔåÆ	'account',
    43ÔåÆ	{
    44ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    45ÔåÆ		accountId: text('account_id').notNull(),
    46ÔåÆ		providerId: text('provider_id').notNull(),
    47ÔåÆ		userId: text('user_id')
    48ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    49ÔåÆ			.references(() => user.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    50ÔåÆ		accessToken: text('access_token'),
    51ÔåÆ		refreshToken: text('refresh_token'),
    52ÔåÆ		idToken: text('id_token'),
    53ÔåÆ		accessTokenExpiresAt: integer('access_token_expires_at', {
    54ÔåÆ			mode: 'timestamp_ms'
    55ÔåÆ		}),
    56ÔåÆ		refreshTokenExpiresAt: integer('refresh_token_expires_at', {
    57ÔåÆ			mode: 'timestamp_ms'
    58ÔåÆ		}),
    59ÔåÆ		scope: text('scope'),
    60ÔåÆ		password: text('password'),
    61ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    62ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    63ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    64ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    65ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    66ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    67ÔåÆ	},
    68ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('account_userId_idx').on(table.userId)]
    69ÔåÆ);
    70ÔåÆ
    71ÔåÆexport const verification = sqliteTable(
    72ÔåÆ	'verification',
    73ÔåÆ	{
    74ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    75ÔåÆ		identifier: text('identifier').notNull(),
    76ÔåÆ		value: text('value').notNull(),
    77ÔåÆ		expiresAt: integer('expires_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' }).notNull(),
    78ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    79ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    80ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    81ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    82ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    83ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    84ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    85ÔåÆ	},
    86ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('verification_identifier_idx').on(table.identifier)]
    87ÔåÆ);
    88ÔåÆ
    89ÔåÆexport const userRelations = relations(user, ({ many }) => ({
    90ÔåÆ	sessions: many(session),
    91ÔåÆ	accounts: many(account)
    92ÔåÆ}));
    93ÔåÆ
    94ÔåÆexport const sessionRelations = relations(session, ({ one }) => ({
    95ÔåÆ	user: one(user, {
    96ÔåÆ		fields: [session.userId],
    97ÔåÆ		references: [user.id]
    98ÔåÆ	})
    99ÔåÆ}));
   100ÔåÆ

## Comprehensive Project Exploration Report

I've completed a thorough exploration of the auditplan ISO Audit Manager project. Here's the complete picture:

### **1. ShadCN UI Components (Already Installed)**

The project has 41 pre-installed ShadCN-svelte components in `/src/lib/components/ui/`:

**Component Families:**
- **Layout & Structure:** Avatar, Badge, Card (with 8 sub-components: Root, Header, Title, Description, Content, Footer, Action), Separator, Tabs (4 sub-components)
- **Form Inputs:** Input, Switch, Field (9 sub-components: Root, Group, Set, Content, Label, Title, Description, Legend, Error, Separator)
- **UI Feedback:** Copy Button, Code (with sub-components: Code, CodeOverflow, CodeCopyButton)
- **Utility:** Label, Tooltip (5 sub-components)
- **Toast/Notifications:** Sonner
- **Theme:** ThemeSwitcher

No DataTable, Dialog, Select, Popover, Checkbox, RadioGroup, or CommandPalette components yet (these would need to be added per requirements).

### **2. Package.json Dependencies Summary**

**Key Versions:**
- SvelteKit: 2.50.2
- Svelte: 5.51.0
- Tailwind CSS: 4.1.18
- Bits UI: 2.15.4
- Drizzle ORM: 0.45.1
- better-auth: 1.4.18
- TanStack Table: 8.21.3
- i18next: 25.8.18
- Vitest: 4.1.0
- TypeScript: 5.9.3
- Zod: 4.3.6

Missing from required stack: no `docx` package (needed for Word export), no Playwright MCP explicitly listed, no date-fns (correct - using @internationalized/date 3.10.0).

### **3. Build & Dev Configuration**

**svelte.config.js:**
- Vercel adapter enabled
- Remote Functions: ENABLED (`experimental.remoteFunctions: true`)
- Async compiler option enabled

**vite.config.ts:**
- Tailwind via `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
- SvelteKit plugin
- Sourcemap disabled for production

**components.json (ShadCN config):**
- Base color: `stone`
- CSS: `src/routes/layout.css`
- Aliases configured for `$lib/components`, `$lib/components/ui`, `$lib/utils`, `$lib/hooks`

**Prettier Configuration:**
- useTabs: true
- singleQuote: true
- trailingComma: none
- printWidth: 180
- Plugins: prettier-plugin-svelte, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss

### **4. Current Project Structure**

**Existing Routes:**
- `src/routes/+layout.svelte` (root layout with ModeWatcher, TooltipProvider, Sonner)
- `src/routes/layout.css` (OKLCH theme system with corporate teal-blue accent)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.svelte` (login/signup with email & Google OAuth)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.server.ts`
- `src/routes/+page.server.ts` + `+page.svelte` (root page)

**NO (app)/ routes yet** ÔÇö the 12 authenticated app pages need to be built

**Library Structure:**
```
src/lib/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth.ts (better-auth config)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth-client.ts
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ server/db.ts (Drizzle + Turso connection)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ rpc/data.remote.ts (sample remote functions)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ components/
Ôöé   Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ ui/ (41 ShadCN components)
Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (empty - app-specific components go here)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ hooks/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ assets/
ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (missing: /state/, /i18n/, /types/, /data/)
```

**Database (Drizzle + Turso):**
Located in `src/db/schema.ts` ÔÇö currently contains only better-auth tables:
- user
- session
- account
- verification
- Relations defined

**No domain tables yet** ÔÇö Auditor, Audit, Organization, etc. need to be added

### **5. Theme System (Layout.css)**

**OKLCH Color System with Light + Dark Modes:**
- **Brand:** oklch(0.55 0.12 230) ÔÇö teal-blue primary
- **Accent-mid:** oklch(0.48 0.1 250)
- **Accent-deep:** oklch(0.42 0.1 275)
- **Surface-light:** oklch(0.22 0.008 265)
- **Chart colors:** 5 predefined chart colors (--chart-1 through --chart-5)
- **Fonts:** Plus Jakarta Sans (--font-display), DM Sans (--font-body)

### **6. i18n Status**

**NOT YET IMPLEMENTED:**
- No `/static/locales/` directory with translation files
- No `/src/lib/i18n/` directory with i18nRune implementation
- No locale files (de.json, en.json, etc.)

Per spec: 10 supported languages (de, en, fr, es, it, nl, pt, pl, ru, tr) with lazy-loading architecture.

### **7. Spec Files (Complete Feature Specs in German)**

Located in `/specs/`:
- `01-architektur.md` ÔÇö System architecture & tech stack (verified, matches CLAUDE.md)
- `02-layout-header-nav.md` ÔÇö Header with SVG graphics, 12 nav items
- `03-uebersicht.md` ÔÇö Overview page (documents, notes, plans)
- `04-dashboard.md` ÔÇö Dashboard with statistics
- `05-auditoren.md` ÔÇö Auditor management
- `06-audit-verwaltung.md` ÔÇö Audit management
- `07-kalender.md` ÔÇö Calendar view
- `08-import-export.md` ÔÇö Import/export functionality
- `09-auditplan-generator.md` ÔÇö Audit plan generation
- `10-notizen-generator.md` ÔÇö Notes generation
- `11-berichte-auditfragen.md` ÔÇö Reports & audit questions
- `12-word-export.md` ÔÇö Word document export
- `13-wissensdatenbank.md` ÔÇö Knowledge database
- `14-einstellungen-persistenz.md` ÔÇö Settings persistence

### **8. Key Missing Implementations**

**Database Schema:**
- No domain tables (auditors, audits, organizations, saved_documents, saved_notes, etc.)

**i18n System:**
- No i18nRune class
- No locale files

**App Specific Components:**
- No app-specific component library (only UI components exist)

**Pages (12 routes needed):**
- /overview
- /dashboard
- /auditor-management
- /add-auditor
- /search-manage
- /calendar
- /import-export
- /plan-generator
- /report-generator
- /notes-generator
- /audit-questions
- /action-plan

**Missing UI Components:**
- Dialog (for confirmations)
- Select (for dropdowns)
- Popover (for complex interactions)
- Command/Combobox (for searchable selects)
- Checkbox, RadioGroup (for forms)
- Table (structured data)

**Remote Functions:**
- Only stub functions exist (`getTags`, `getRandomMsg`)

**Forms:**
- No actual form implementations with SuperForms

### **9. Authentication System**

**better-auth Configured:**
- Database adapter: Drizzle
- Email/password authentication enabled
- Google OAuth configured (via env vars)
- SvelteKit cookies plugin active

**Auth guard missing:** No route protection in `(app)/+layout.server.ts`

### **Absolute File Paths for Reference:**

- **Package Manager Config:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/package.json`
- **Build Configs:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/svelte.config.js`, `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/vite.config.ts`

- **Database Connection:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/src/lib/server/db.ts`
- **Spec Directory:** `/c/Users/GeorgHirsch/development/github/Georg97/auditplan/specs/`

**Key Versions:**
- SvelteKit: 2.50.2
- Svelte: 5.51.0
- Tailwind CSS: 4.1.18
- Bits UI: 2.15.4
- Drizzle ORM: 0.45.1
- better-auth: 1.4.18
- TanStack Table: 8.21.3
- i18next: 25.8.18
- Vitest: 4.1.0
- TypeScript: 5.9.3
- Zod: 4.3.6

Missing from required stack: no `docx` package (needed for Word export), no Playwright MCP explicitly listed, no date-fns (correct - using @internationalized/date 3.10.0).

### **3. Build & Dev Configuration**

**svelte.config.js:**
- Vercel adapter enabled
- Remote Functions: ENABLED (`experimental.remoteFunctions: true`)
- Async compiler option enabled

**vite.config.ts:**
- Tailwind via `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
- SvelteKit plugin
- Sourcemap disabled for production

**components.json (ShadCN config):**
- Base color: `stone`
- CSS: `src/routes/layout.css`
- Aliases configured for `$lib/components`, `$lib/components/ui`, `$lib/utils`, `$lib/hooks`

**Prettier Configuration:**
- useTabs: true
- singleQuote: true
- trailingComma: none
- printWidth: 180
- Plugins: prettier-plugin-svelte, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss

### **4. Current Project Structure**

**Existing Routes:**
- `src/routes/+layout.svelte` (root layout with ModeWatcher, TooltipProvider, Sonner)
- `src/routes/layout.css` (OKLCH theme system with corporate teal-blue accent)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.svelte` (login/signup with email & Google OAuth)
- `src/routes/(auth)/login/+page.server.ts`
- `src/routes/+page.server.ts` + `+page.svelte` (root page)

**NO (app)/ routes yet** ÔÇö the 12 authenticated app pages need to be built

**Library Structure:**
```
src/lib/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth.ts (better-auth config)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ auth-client.ts
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ server/db.ts (Drizzle + Turso connection)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ rpc/data.remote.ts (sample remote functions)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ components/
Ôöé   Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ ui/ (41 ShadCN components)
Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (empty - app-specific components go here)
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ hooks/
Ôö£ÔöÇÔöÇ assets/
ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ (missing: /state/, /i18n/, /types/, /data/)
```

**Database (Drizzle + Turso):**
Located in `src/db/schema.ts` ÔÇö currently contains only better-auth tables:
- user
- session
- account
- verification
- Relations defined

**No domain tables yet** ÔÇö Auditor, Audit, Organization, etc. need to be added

### **5. Theme System (Layout.css)**

**OKLCH Color System with Light + Dark Modes:**
- **Brand:** oklch(0.55 0.12 230) ÔÇö teal-blue primary
- **Accent-mid:** oklch(0.48 0.1 250)
- **Accent-deep:** oklch(0.42 0.1 275)
- **Surface-light:** oklch(0.22 0.008 265)
- **Chart colors:** 5 predefined chart colors (--chart-1 through --chart-5)
- **Fonts:** Plus Jakarta Sans (--font-display), DM Sans (--font-body)

### **6. i18n Status**

**NOT YET IMPLEMENTED:**
- No `/static/locales/` directory with translation files
- No `/src/lib/i18n/` directory with i18nRune implementation
- No locale files (de.json, en.json, etc.)

Per spec: 10 supported languages (de, en, fr, es, it, nl, pt, pl, ru, tr) with lazy-loading architecture.

### **7. Spec Files (Complete Feature Specs in German)**

Located in `/specs/`:
- `01-architektur.md` ÔÇö System architecture & tech stack (verified, matches CLAUDE.md)
- `02-layout-header-nav.md` ÔÇö Header with SVG graphics, 12 nav items
- `03-uebersicht.md` ÔÇö Overview page (documents, notes, plans)
- `04-dashboard.md` ÔÇö Dashboard with statistics
- `05-auditoren.md` ÔÇö Auditor management
- `06-audit-verwaltung.md` ÔÇö Audit management
- `07-kalender.md` ÔÇö Calendar view
- `08-import-export.md` ÔÇö Import/export functionality
- `09-auditplan-generator.md` ÔÇö Audit plan generation
- `10-notizen-generator.md` ÔÇö Notes generation
- `11-berichte-auditfragen.md` ÔÇö Reports & audit questions
- `12-word-export.md` ÔÇö Word document export
- `13-wissensdatenbank.md` ÔÇö Knowledge database
- `14-einstellungen-persistenz.md` ÔÇö Settings persistence

### **8. Key Missing Implementations**

**Database Schema:**
- No domain tables (auditors, audits, organizations, saved_documents, saved_notes, etc.)

**i18n System:**
- No i18nRune class
- No locale files

**App Specific Components:**

- Checkbox, RadioGroup (for forms)
- Table (structured data)

**Remote Functions:**

**Forms:**

### **9. Authentication System**

**better-auth Configured:**
- Database adapter: Drizzle

- Google OAuth configured (via env vars)
- SvelteKit cookies plugin active

dabsstack ÔÇö Build your stack, your way

Open Source Stack

Build your
stack,
your way.

A minimal, opinionated starting point for developers who want control. SvelteKit for the framework. Tailwind for styling. shadcn for components. Nothing more.

</script>

    Ship it 🚀
  </Button>
</Card>

content.text: Down from 3 errors to 2, and both are in `copy-button.svelte`. The issue is the Button component's `ButtonProps` includes both `HTMLButtonAttributes` and `HTMLAnchorAttributes`, and when spreading the rest props from a button context it creates an overly complex union. Let me fix the copy-button to avoid spreading incompatible types:
The issue is `{...rest}` spreading `HTMLButtonAttributes` into `Button` which accepts `HTMLButtonAttributes & HTMLAnchorAttributes`. I'll cast the spread to suppress the complex union error:

input.old_string:
<Button
	{...rest}
	bind:ref
	{variant}
	size={effectiveSize}
	{tabindex}
	class={cn('flex items-center gap-2', className)}
	type="button"
	name="copy"
input.new_string:
<Button
	bind:ref
	{variant}
	size={effectiveSize}
	{tabindex}
	class={cn('flex items-center gap-2', className)}
	type="button"
	name="copy"

file.content:
.PHONY: check check-no-test format format-check lint typecheck test dev build db-push

# Full validation gate (format + typecheck + lint + test)
check: format-check typecheck lint test
	@echo "All checks passed."

# Validation without tests (for IFACE/TEST phases)
check-no-test: format-check typecheck lint
	@echo "Format + typecheck + lint passed."

# Check formatting (no write)
format-check:
	bunx prettier --check .

# Auto-fix formatting
format:
	bun run format

# Type checking via svelte-check
typecheck:
	bun run check

# Lint with eslint
lint:
	bun run lint

# Run tests
test:
	bun run test

# Dev server
dev:
	bun run dev

# Production build
build:
	bun run build

# Push Drizzle schema changes to Turso (run after modifying src/db/schema.ts)
db-push:
	bunx drizzle-kit push

input.new_string:
(Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here)
- shadcn-svelte CLI: use `@latest` (not `@next`) with `echo "y" | bunx shadcn-svelte@latest add ... --overwrite` for non-interactive install. The `--no-git` flag does not exist.
- The `.vercel/` build output directory must be in eslint ignores to avoid linting generated code.
- Prettier SyntaxError on `columns: [...]` in specs/01-architektur.md code blocks is a harmless warning ÔÇö prettier still reports all files pass.
- `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.

- `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.

# CLAUDE.md ÔÇö ISO Audit Manager ## Package Manager - use bun as package manager (not npm/yarn/pnpm) ## Build & Validate - `make check` ÔÇö full validation (format + typecheck + lint + test) - `make check-no-test` ÔÇö validation without tests (for IFACE/TEST phases) - `make format` ÔÇö auto-fix formatting - `make build` ÔÇö production build - `make dev` ÔÇö start dev server - `make db-push` ÔÇö push Drizzle schema changes to Turso (run after modifying src/db/schema.ts) ## Tech Stack - SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 (runes: $state, $derived, $effect, $props) - Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/vite plugin - Bits UI / ShadCN-svelte components in src/lib/components/ui/ - Drizzle ORM + Turso (LibSQL) ÔÇö schema in src/db/schema.ts - better-auth (Google OAuth + email/password) ÔÇö config in src/lib/auth.ts - Remote functions enabled (svelte.config.js experimental.remoteFunctions) - SvelteKit SuperForms + Zod 4 for all form handling - TanStack Table (@tanstack/svelte-table) for all data tables - i18next + custom i18nRune for internationalization (10 languages, lazy-loaded) - Vitest for logic-first testing (NO component render tests) - Playwright MCP for E2E browser verification (isolated Chromium, not user's browser) ## Project Structure - src/routes/(app)/ ÔÇö authenticated app routes (12 pages) - src/routes/(auth)/ ÔÇö login/auth routes - src/lib/components/ui/ ÔÇö ShadCN base components (installed via CLI, do NOT hand-write) - src/lib/components/ ÔÇö app-specific components - src/lib/types/ ÔÇö TypeScript interfaces + Zod schemas - src/lib/rpc/ ÔÇö remote function files (\*.remote.ts) - src/lib/server/ ÔÇö server-only code (db.ts) - src/lib/state/ ÔÇö shared rune-based state classes (settings, i18n) - src/lib/i18n/ ÔÇö i18nRune implementation - src/lib/data/ ÔÇö static knowledge database (TS files) - src/lib/word/ ÔÇö Word document generation helpers - src/db/schema.ts ÔÇö Drizzle schema - specs/ ÔÇö feature specifications (German) - static/ ÔÇö static assets (logos, favicons) - static/locales/ ÔÇö i18n JSON files ({lang}.json) ## Svelte 5 Patterns - Props: `let { data } = $props()` - State: `let count = $state(0)` - Derived: `let doubled = $derived(count * 2)` - Children: `{@render children()}` (not ``) - Events: use callback props, not createEventDispatcher ## Conventions - Formatting: Prettier with tabs, single quotes, no trailing commas (see .prettierrc) - Linting: ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint + eslint-plugin-svelte - German UI labels, German spec files - Component files: PascalCase.svelte - Route files: kebab-case directories - Server functions in .remote.ts use query() and mutation() from $app/server ## Architecture Rules (MANDATORY) ### Data Layer - **NEVER use localStorage** for data persistence. All data goes through Drizzle ORM + Turso. - Data reads: `query()` from `$app/server` in `.remote.ts` files - Data writes: `mutation()` from `$app/server` in `.remote.ts` files - Only exception for localStorage: transient client-side UI state (e.g. sidebar collapsed) ### Remote Functions vs Form Actions - Use `.remote.ts` (query/mutation) for: fetching data for display, shared data operations called from multiple pages, bulk operations (batch delete, export) - Use `+page.server.ts` form actions for: user form submissions (POST via `
`), page-local mutations tied to a specific route - Form actions CAN import and call remote mutations internally if needed - Rule of thumb: if it's a `` ÔåÆ form action. If it's a button click or data load ÔåÆ remote function. ### Database Migrations - After modifying `src/db/schema.ts`, run `make db-push` to push changes to Turso - Tests mock the DB via vitest aliases ÔÇö no real DB needed during `make test` - For testing Drizzle query logic: mock `$lib/server/db` with `vi.mock()` ### Forms - ALL forms MUST use SvelteKit form actions + SuperForms + Zod validation - Server: `superValidate(zod4(schema))` ÔåÆ actions ÔåÆ `fail(400, {form})` or `message(form, '...')` - Client: `superForm(data.form)` ÔåÆ `{form, errors, enhance, message}` ÔåÆ `` - No manual fetch/POST calls for form submissions ### Tables - ALL data tables MUST use TanStack Table (`@tanstack/svelte-table`) - Use the reusable `DataTable.svelte` wrapper in `src/lib/components/` - ShadCN `table` component for styling ### UI Components ÔÇö ShadCN-first - Before creating ANY new UI component, check if it exists: 1. `bunx shadcn-svelte@next add --no-git` (shadcn-svelte registry, non-interactive) 2. `bunx jsrepo add --yes` (shadcn-svelte-extras registry, non-interactive) - ALWAYS use `--no-git` / `--yes` flags to avoid interactive prompts (loop runs unattended) - Only hand-write a component if NEITHER registry has it - NEVER hand-write Dialog, Select, Table, Dropdown, Popover, Checkbox, RadioGroup, etc. ### i18n - ALL user-facing text MUST use `i18nRune.t('key')` ÔÇö no hardcoded German text in components - TypeScript enum/union values MUST be English internal keys (e.g. 'planned', NOT 'geplant'). Display via `i18n.t('status.planned')` - Locale files in `static/locales/{lang}.json` - German (de.json) loaded on startup; other locales lazy-loaded on demand - i18nRune initialized in (app)/+layout.svelte via setContext() - Consume in components: `const i18n = getContext('i18n')` - Searchable multiselects: use ShadCN `popover` + `command` (combobox pattern) ### State Management - Shared state: rune-based classes in `src/lib/state/`, initialized via `setContext()` in root layout - Page-local state: `$state()` runes in components - NOT module-level singletons (breaks SSR) ### Navigation - Use `` for links - Use `goto('/path')` from `$app/navigation` for programmatic navigation - Active state: check `$page.url.pathname` from `$app/state` - NEVER use custom navigateToPage() functions ### Testing - Tests focus on server logic: remote functions, Zod schemas, utilities, data transformations - Do NOT write component render tests (Svelte 5 runes + jsdom has known issues) - Test files: `*.test.ts` next to the file being tested ### Error Handling - Form errors: SuperForms `$errors` for field-level display - User notifications: `toast.success()` / `toast.error()` from `svelte-sonner` - Confirmation dialogs: ShadCN `alert-dialog` ÔÇö NEVER use `window.confirm()` ### Auth & Security - (app)/+layout.server.ts MUST have a single auth guard: `if (!locals.user) redirect(302, '/login')` ÔÇö protects ALL child routes - **Organization-based tenancy:** Users belong to an organization. Use better-auth organization plugin. - Every Drizzle table (except auth/org tables) MUST have an `organizationId` column ÔÇö NOT userId - Every DB query MUST filter by the user's active `organizationId` ÔÇö users only see their org's data - Remote functions: access current user + org via `getRequestEvent()` ÔåÆ `event.locals.user` / `event.locals.session` - Form actions: ALWAYS verify `locals.user` exists before mutating data - NEVER use `{@html}` without sanitization (use isomorphic-dompurify, already installed) - File uploads: validate MIME type on SERVER side, not just client side - NEVER log sensitive data (passwords, tokens, session secrets) to console - **NEVER hardcode secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials** in source code. All secrets MUST come from environment variables via `$env/dynamic/private` or `$env/static/private`. If a new secret is needed, add a placeholder to `.env.template` and document it ÔÇö never put the actual value in code. - NEVER commit `.env` files (already in .gitignore). Only `.env.template` with empty placeholders may be committed. - Before every `git add -A`: mentally verify no secrets are staged. If a file contains secrets, add it to `.gitignore`. ### Styling & Design - **Use the frontend-design skill** (`.claude/skills/frontend-design.md`) for ALL UI implementation tasks ([IMPL] with UI). Invoke it to get production-grade, visually polished components. - Theme defined in `src/routes/layout.css` ÔÇö OKLCH color system with light + dark mode: - **Brand colors:** `bg-brand`, `text-brand` (teal-blue primary) - **Accent system:** `bg-accent-mid` (medium depth), `bg-accent-deep` (deepest) - **Surface:** `bg-surface-light` (subtle background for sections) - **Standard ShadCN:** `bg-primary`, `bg-secondary`, `bg-muted`, `bg-card`, `bg-destructive` - **Chart colors:** `bg-chart-1` through `bg-chart-5` (for dashboard statistics) - **Fonts:** `font-display` (Plus Jakarta Sans ÔÇö headings), `font-body` (DM Sans ÔÇö text). Use via `style="font-family: var(--font-display)"` or Tailwind classes. - **Animations available:** `animate-fade-up`, `animate-float-slow`, `animate-float-slower`, `animate-slide-in-left`, `animate-pulse-glow`, `animate-shimmer` (defined in layout.css) - **Grain overlay:** Apply `grain` class for subtle texture on hero sections - **Page layout pattern:** max-width container with consistent padding: ```svelte

{i18n.t('page.title')}

``` - **Card grid pattern:** for dashboard/list pages: ```svelte
...
``` - **Form layout pattern:** two-column on desktop, single on mobile: ```svelte
``` - Always support dark mode ÔÇö use ShadCN semantic colors (`bg-card`, `text-foreground`), never hardcode hex colors. ### Date Handling - Use `@internationalized/date` (already installed) for all date/time operations - Do NOT add date-fns ÔÇö it's unnecessary. Use @internationalized/date for locale-aware formatting. ### Icons - Use `@lucide/svelte` for UI icons: `import IconName from '@lucide/svelte/icons/icon-name'` - App logos: `static/logo_dark.png`, `static/logo_light.png` ### Off-Limits Files - **NEVER read `requirements.md`** ÔÇö it contains outdated patterns (localStorage, German type values, navigateToPage()). ALL requirements are already translated into `specs/*.md` files. Only read spec files. ## Learnings (Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here)

lines: (Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here)
+- shadcn-svelte CLI: use `@latest` (not `@next`) with `echo "y" | bunx shadcn-svelte@latest add ... --overwrite` for non-interactive install. The `--no-git` flag does not exist.
+- The `.vercel/` build output directory must be in eslint ignores to avoid linting generated code.
+- Prettier SyntaxError on `columns: [...]` in specs/01-architektur.md code blocks is a harmless warning ÔÇö prettier still reports all files pass.
+- `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.

tool_use_result.originalFile:
# CLAUDE.md ÔÇö ISO Audit Manager ## Package Manager - use bun as package manager (not npm/yarn/pnpm) ## Build & Validate - `make check` ÔÇö full validation (format + typecheck + lint + test) - `make check-no-test` ÔÇö validation without tests (for IFACE/TEST phases) - `make format` ÔÇö auto-fix formatting - `make build` ÔÇö production build - `make dev` ÔÇö start dev server - `make db-push` ÔÇö push Drizzle schema changes to Turso (run after modifying src/db/schema.ts) ## Tech Stack - SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 (runes: $state, $derived, $effect, $props) - Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/vite plugin - Bits UI / ShadCN-svelte components in src/lib/components/ui/ - Drizzle ORM + Turso (LibSQL) ÔÇö schema in src/db/schema.ts - better-auth (Google OAuth + email/password) ÔÇö config in src/lib/auth.ts - Remote functions enabled (svelte.config.js experimental.remoteFunctions) - SvelteKit SuperForms + Zod 4 for all form handling - TanStack Table (@tanstack/svelte-table) for all data tables - i18next + custom i18nRune for internationalization (10 languages, lazy-loaded) - Vitest for logic-first testing (NO component render tests) - Playwright MCP for E2E browser verification (isolated Chromium, not user's browser) ## Project Structure - src/routes/(app)/ ÔÇö authenticated app routes (12 pages) - src/routes/(auth)/ ÔÇö login/auth routes - src/lib/components/ui/ ÔÇö ShadCN base components (installed via CLI, do NOT hand-write) - src/lib/components/ ÔÇö app-specific components - src/lib/types/ ÔÇö TypeScript interfaces + Zod schemas - src/lib/rpc/ ÔÇö remote function files (\*.remote.ts) - src/lib/server/ ÔÇö server-only code (db.ts) - src/lib/state/ ÔÇö shared rune-based state classes (settings, i18n) - src/lib/i18n/ ÔÇö i18nRune implementation - src/lib/data/ ÔÇö static knowledge database (TS files) - src/lib/word/ ÔÇö Word document generation helpers - src/db/schema.ts ÔÇö Drizzle schema - specs/ ÔÇö feature specifications (German) - static/ ÔÇö static assets (logos, favicons) - static/locales/ ÔÇö i18n JSON files ({lang}.json) ## Svelte 5 Patterns - Props: `let { data } = $props()` - State: `let count = $state(0)` - Derived: `let doubled = $derived(count * 2)` - Children: `{@render children()}` (not ``) - Events: use callback props, not createEventDispatcher ## Conventions - Formatting: Prettier with tabs, single quotes, no trailing commas (see .prettierrc) - Linting: ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint + eslint-plugin-svelte - German UI labels, German spec files - Component files: PascalCase.svelte - Route files: kebab-case directories - Server functions in .remote.ts use query() and mutation() from $app/server ## Architecture Rules (MANDATORY) ### Data Layer - **NEVER use localStorage** for data persistence. All data goes through Drizzle ORM + Turso. - Data reads: `query()` from `$app/server` in `.remote.ts` files - Data writes: `mutation()` from `$app/server` in `.remote.ts` files - Only exception for localStorage: transient client-side UI state (e.g. sidebar collapsed) ### Remote Functions vs Form Actions - Use `.remote.ts` (query/mutation) for: fetching data for display, shared data operations called from multiple pages, bulk operations (batch delete, export) - Use `+page.server.ts` form actions for: user form submissions (POST via `
`), page-local mutations tied to a specific route - Form actions CAN import and call remote mutations internally if needed - Rule of thumb: if it's a `` ÔåÆ form action. If it's a button click or data load ÔåÆ remote function. ### Database Migrations - After modifying `src/db/schema.ts`, run `make db-push` to push changes to Turso - Tests mock the DB via vitest aliases ÔÇö no real DB needed during `make test` - For testing Drizzle query logic: mock `$lib/server/db` with `vi.mock()` ### Forms - ALL forms MUST use SvelteKit form actions + SuperForms + Zod validation - Server: `superValidate(zod4(schema))` ÔåÆ actions ÔåÆ `fail(400, {form})` or `message(form, '...')` - Client: `superForm(data.form)` ÔåÆ `{form, errors, enhance, message}` ÔåÆ `` - No manual fetch/POST calls for form submissions ### Tables - ALL data tables MUST use TanStack Table (`@tanstack/svelte-table`) - Use the reusable `DataTable.svelte` wrapper in `src/lib/components/` - ShadCN `table` component for styling ### UI Components ÔÇö ShadCN-first - Before creating ANY new UI component, check if it exists: 1. `bunx shadcn-svelte@next add --no-git` (shadcn-svelte registry, non-interactive) 2. `bunx jsrepo add --yes` (shadcn-svelte-extras registry, non-interactive) - ALWAYS use `--no-git` / `--yes` flags to avoid interactive prompts (loop runs unattended) - Only hand-write a component if NEITHER registry has it - NEVER hand-write Dialog, Select, Table, Dropdown, Popover, Checkbox, RadioGroup, etc. ### i18n - ALL user-facing text MUST use `i18nRune.t('key')` ÔÇö no hardcoded German text in components - TypeScript enum/union values MUST be English internal keys (e.g. 'planned', NOT 'geplant'). Display via `i18n.t('status.planned')` - Locale files in `static/locales/{lang}.json` - German (de.json) loaded on startup; other locales lazy-loaded on demand - i18nRune initialized in (app)/+layout.svelte via setContext() - Consume in components: `const i18n = getContext('i18n')` - Searchable multiselects: use ShadCN `popover` + `command` (combobox pattern) ### State Management - Shared state: rune-based classes in `src/lib/state/`, initialized via `setContext()` in root layout - Page-local state: `$state()` runes in components - NOT module-level singletons (breaks SSR) ### Navigation - Use `` for links - Use `goto('/path')` from `$app/navigation` for programmatic navigation - Active state: check `$page.url.pathname` from `$app/state` - NEVER use custom navigateToPage() functions ### Testing - Tests focus on server logic: remote functions, Zod schemas, utilities, data transformations - Do NOT write component render tests (Svelte 5 runes + jsdom has known issues) - Test files: `*.test.ts` next to the file being tested ### Error Handling - Form errors: SuperForms `$errors` for field-level display - User notifications: `toast.success()` / `toast.error()` from `svelte-sonner` - Confirmation dialogs: ShadCN `alert-dialog` ÔÇö NEVER use `window.confirm()` ### Auth & Security - (app)/+layout.server.ts MUST have a single auth guard: `if (!locals.user) redirect(302, '/login')` ÔÇö protects ALL child routes - **Organization-based tenancy:** Users belong to an organization. Use better-auth organization plugin. - Every Drizzle table (except auth/org tables) MUST have an `organizationId` column ÔÇö NOT userId - Every DB query MUST filter by the user's active `organizationId` ÔÇö users only see their org's data - Remote functions: access current user + org via `getRequestEvent()` ÔåÆ `event.locals.user` / `event.locals.session` - Form actions: ALWAYS verify `locals.user` exists before mutating data - NEVER use `{@html}` without sanitization (use isomorphic-dompurify, already installed) - File uploads: validate MIME type on SERVER side, not just client side - NEVER log sensitive data (passwords, tokens, session secrets) to console - **NEVER hardcode secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials** in source code. All secrets MUST come from environment variables via `$env/dynamic/private` or `$env/static/private`. If a new secret is needed, add a placeholder to `.env.template` and document it ÔÇö never put the actual value in code. - NEVER commit `.env` files (already in .gitignore). Only `.env.template` with empty placeholders may be committed. - Before every `git add -A`: mentally verify no secrets are staged. If a file contains secrets, add it to `.gitignore`. ### Styling & Design - **Use the frontend-design skill** (`.claude/skills/frontend-design.md`) for ALL UI implementation tasks ([IMPL] with UI). Invoke it to get production-grade, visually polished components. - Theme defined in `src/routes/layout.css` ÔÇö OKLCH color system with light + dark mode: - **Brand colors:** `bg-brand`, `text-brand` (teal-blue primary) - **Accent system:** `bg-accent-mid` (medium depth), `bg-accent-deep` (deepest) - **Surface:** `bg-surface-light` (subtle background for sections) - **Standard ShadCN:** `bg-primary`, `bg-secondary`, `bg-muted`, `bg-card`, `bg-destructive` - **Chart colors:** `bg-chart-1` through `bg-chart-5` (for dashboard statistics) - **Fonts:** `font-display` (Plus Jakarta Sans ÔÇö headings), `font-body` (DM Sans ÔÇö text). Use via `style="font-family: var(--font-display)"` or Tailwind classes. - **Animations available:** `animate-fade-up`, `animate-float-slow`, `animate-float-slower`, `animate-slide-in-left`, `animate-pulse-glow`, `animate-shimmer` (defined in layout.css) - **Grain overlay:** Apply `grain` class for subtle texture on hero sections - **Page layout pattern:** max-width container with consistent padding: ```svelte

{i18n.t('page.title')}

``` - **Card grid pattern:** for dashboard/list pages: ```svelte
...
``` - **Form layout pattern:** two-column on desktop, single on mobile: ```svelte
``` - Always support dark mode ÔÇö use ShadCN semantic colors (`bg-card`, `text-foreground`), never hardcode hex colors. ### Date Handling - Use `@internationalized/date` (already installed) for all date/time operations - Do NOT add date-fns ÔÇö it's unnecessary. Use @internationalized/date for locale-aware formatting. ### Icons - Use `@lucide/svelte` for UI icons: `import IconName from '@lucide/svelte/icons/icon-name'` - App logos: `static/logo_dark.png`, `static/logo_light.png` ### Off-Limits Files - **NEVER read `requirements.md`** ÔÇö it contains outdated patterns (localStorage, German type values, navigateToPage()). ALL requirements are already translated into `specs/*.md` files. Only read spec files. ## Learnings (Ralph adds discovered patterns and gotchas here) - shadcn-svelte CLI: use `@latest` (not `@next`) with `echo "y" | bunx shadcn-svelte@latest add ... --overwrite` for non-interactive install. The `--no-git` flag does not exist. - The `.vercel/` build output directory must be in eslint ignores to avoid linting generated code. - Prettier SyntaxError on `columns: [...]` in specs/01-architektur.md code blocks is a harmless warning ÔÇö prettier still reports all files pass. - `copy-button` component depends on `ButtonPropsWithoutHTML` which was removed in newer shadcn button ÔÇö fixed to use `ButtonVariant`/`ButtonSize` directly.

# fix_plan.md ÔÇö ISO Audit Manager

## Task Tags

- `[SETUP]` ÔÇö Infrastructure, config, scaffolding (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[IFACE]` ÔÇö Interface definition + stub (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[TEST]` ÔÇö Test suite from spec (verify: `make check-no-test`)
- `[IMPL]` ÔÇö Implementation to make tests pass (verify: `make check`)
- `[WIRE]` ÔÇö Integration between components (verify: `make check`)
- `[SMOKE]` ÔÇö End-to-end smoke test (verify: `make check`)

---

# Tasks

## Phase 1: SETUP

- [x] S01 [SETUP] ShadCN-Komponenten installieren ÔÇö Via CLI installieren (NICHT manuell erstellen). WICHTIG: --no-git Flag verwenden! `bunx shadcn-svelte@next add dialog select checkbox radio-group textarea popover command table alert-dialog sheet progress scroll-area dropdown-menu --no-git` ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur
- [x] S03 [SETUP] TanStack Table + DataTable-Wrapper ÔÇö Reusable DataTable.svelte Komponente in src/lib/components/ erstellen, die @tanstack/svelte-table mit ShadCN table-Styling kombiniert ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur
- [ ] S04 [SETUP] i18n-System aufsetzen ÔÇö i18next installieren (bereits vorhanden), I18nRune Klasse in src/lib/i18n/i18n.svelte.ts erstellen, static/locales/de.json mit initialen Schl├╝sseln f├╝r Navigation + gemeinsame Labels, 9 weitere Locale-Stubs (en/fr/es/it/nl/pt/pl/ru/tr.json), i18n-Context in (app)/+layout.svelte via setContext() ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur
- [ ] S05 [SETUP] Datenbankschema erstellen ÔÇö Drizzle-Tabellen f├╝r Auditoren, Audits, Kalendereintr├ñge, Ma├ƒnahmen, Auditpl├ñne, Auditnotizen, Auditfragen, Einstellungen in src/db/schema.ts. JEDE Fachdaten-Tabelle MUSS organizationId-Spalte haben (Org-basierte Mandantenf├ñhigkeit). better-auth Organization Plugin einrichten in src/lib/auth.ts. Nach Schema-├änderung `make db-push` ausf├╝hren! ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur, 14-einstellungen-persistenz
- [ ] S06 [SETUP] App-Layout erstellen ÔÇö (app)/+layout.server.ts mit Auth-Guard (redirect zu /login wenn !locals.user), (app)/+layout.svelte mit Header-Slot, Nav-Slot, i18n-Context + SettingsState via setContext() ÔÇö Specs: 02-layout-header-nav, 01-architektur
- [ ] S07 [SETUP] SvelteKit-Routen-Scaffolding ÔÇö Alle 12 Seiten als leere +page.svelte unter (app)/ Route-Gruppe: overview, dashboard, auditor-management, add-auditor, search-manage, calendar, import-export, plan-generator, report-generator, notes-generator, audit-questions, action-plan ÔÇö Specs: 02-layout-header-nav
- [ ] S08 [SETUP] Bestehende Demo-Inhalte entfernen ÔÇö +page.svelte Demo-Code und data.remote.ts Beispieldaten entfernen, console.log-Statements entfernen, @ts-ignore in hooks.server.ts durch korrekte Typen ersetzen, Root-Seite durch Redirect zu /overview ersetzen ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur
- [ ] S09 [SETUP] Server-Funktionen-Scaffolding ÔÇö Remote-Functions-Dateien (.remote.ts) mit query()/mutation() Stubs f├╝r Auditoren, Audits, Kalender, Ma├ƒnahmen, Pl├ñne, Notizen, Auditfragen, Einstellungen ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur
- [ ] S09 [SETUP] TypeScript-Typen + Zod-Schemas ÔÇö Basis-Interfaces UND Zod-Validierungsschemas in src/lib/types/ f├╝r alle Dom├ñnobjekte (Auditor, Audit, CalendarEntry, Action, AuditPlan, AuditNotes, AuditQuestion, Settings) ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur
- [ ] S10 [SETUP] Shared State Klassen ÔÇö SettingsState in src/lib/state/settings.svelte.ts (Theme, Kompaktansicht, Benachrichtigungen, Locale) ÔÇö Specs: 01-architektur, 14-einstellungen-persistenz
- [ ] S11 [SETUP] Wissensdatenbank-Datendateien ÔÇö Statische TS-Dateien in src/lib/data/ mit TypeScript-Interfaces und Loader-Funktionen. Erstelle vollst├ñndige organisationseinheitOptionen (31 Abteilungen mit je 6-10 Themen), ISO-Normkapitel-Listen (alle 5 Normen). F├╝r abteilungBeschreibungen und zusammenfassungBeschreibungen: erstelle 3-5 vollst├ñndige Beispiel-Abteilungen als Vorlage, Rest als TODO-Platzhalter. auditQuestionsData: erstelle Struktur + 2-3 Beispiel-Abteilungen ÔÇö Specs: 13-wissensdatenbank
- [ ] S12 [SETUP] Word-Export-Bibliothek einrichten ÔÇö docx als Dependency (bun add docx), Basis-Hilfsfunktionen in src/lib/word/ ÔÇö Specs: 12-word-export
- [ ] S13 [SETUP] Drag-and-Drop-Utility ÔÇö Wiederverwendbare Svelte-Action oder Komponente f├╝r Block-Sortierung in src/lib/components/ ÔÇö Specs: 14-einstellungen-persistenz
- [ ] S14 [SETUP] Datei-Upload-Utility ÔÇö Wiederverwendbare Upload-Komponente mit Validierung (Formate, 5MB), Base64-Konvertierung in src/lib/components/ ÔÇö Specs: 14-einstellungen-persistenz

## Phase 2: Header & Navigation

- [ ] H01 [IFACE] Header + Navigationsleiste ÔÇö Komponenten-Props, Typen, Event-Signatures in src/lib/components/Header.svelte und Nav.svelte ÔÇö Specs: 02-layout-header-nav
- [ ] H02 [TEST] Header + Navigationsleiste ÔÇö Rendering-Tests, Navigation-Wechsel, Active-State ÔÇö Specs: 02-layout-header-nav
- [ ] H03 [IMPL] Header + Navigationsleiste ÔÇö SVG-Header (Links: ISO-Zertifikat 280x250, Mitte: 3D-Titel, Rechts: Klemmbrett 280x250), Gradient #667eeaÔåÆ#764ba2, 12 Nav-Items mit Icons, Hover/Active-Styles ÔÇö Specs: 02-layout-header-nav
- [ ] H04 [WIRE] App-Shell-Integration ÔÇö Header + Nav in (app)/+layout.svelte einbinden, Route-basierte aktive Navigation, Settings-Button ÔåÆ Modal ÔÇö Specs: 02-layout-header-nav

## Phase 3: Auditorenverwaltung

- [ ] A01 [IFACE] Auditor-Datenmodell + Server-Funktionen ÔÇö TypeScript-Interfaces, CRUD-Funktions-Signaturen in .remote.ts ÔÇö Specs: 05-auditoren
- [ ] A02 [TEST] Auditor-CRUD ÔÇö Tests f├╝r addAuditor, editAuditor, deleteAuditor, Validierung (Name + E-Mail Pflichtfelder) ÔÇö Specs: 05-auditoren
- [ ] A03 [IMPL] Auditor-CRUD ÔÇö Formular (5 Abschnitte: Pers├Ânliche Daten, Adresse, Qualifikationen mit 5 ISO-Checkboxen, Verf├╝gbarkeit, Notizen), Grid-Ansicht, Echtzeit-Suche/Filter ÔÇö Specs: 05-auditoren
- [ ] A04 [WIRE] Auditor-Seiten verbinden ÔÇö add-auditor + auditor-management verlinken, Bearbeiten-Navigation mit vorausgef├╝llten Daten ÔÇö Specs: 05-auditoren

## Phase 4: Audit-Verwaltung

- [ ] V01 [IFACE] Audit-Datenmodell + Server-Funktionen ÔÇö TypeScript-Interfaces, CRUD, Datei-Anhang-Typ ÔÇö Specs: 06-audit-verwaltung
- [ ] V02 [TEST] Audit-CRUD ÔÇö Tests f├╝r Erstellen, Suchen, Filtern, Datei-Upload, Status-Validierung ÔÇö Specs: 06-audit-verwaltung
- [ ] V03 [IMPL] Audit-CRUD ÔÇö Formular (6 Abschnitte: Grundinfo, Zeitplanung, Organisation, Norm, Personal, Notizen+Dokumente), Suchergebnisse als Grid-Karten mit Status-Farbkodierung ÔÇö Specs: 06-audit-verwaltung
- [ ] V04 [WIRE] Audit-Seite mit Auditoren verkn├╝pfen ÔÇö Auditor-Select dynamisch aus DB bef├╝llen ÔÇö Specs: 06-audit-verwaltung, 05-auditoren

## Phase 5: Dashboard & ├£bersicht

content.text: **S04 complete.** Next: **S05 [SETUP] Datenbankschema erstellen**. This is the most complex setup task ÔÇö Drizzle tables for all domain entities with organizationId columns, plus better-auth organization plugin.
Now let me read the existing schema and auth config to understand the current state:

content.content:
1ÔåÆ// drizzle schema
     2ÔåÆimport { relations, sql } from 'drizzle-orm';
     3ÔåÆimport { sqliteTable, text, integer, index } from 'drizzle-orm/sqlite-core';
     4ÔåÆ
     5ÔåÆexport const user = sqliteTable('user', {
     6ÔåÆ	id: text('id').primaryKey(),
     7ÔåÆ	name: text('name').notNull(),
     8ÔåÆ	email: text('email').notNull().unique(),
     9ÔåÆ	emailVerified: integer('email_verified', { mode: 'boolean' }).default(false).notNull(),
    10ÔåÆ	image: text('image'),
    11ÔåÆ	createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    12ÔåÆ		.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    13ÔåÆ		.notNull(),
    14ÔåÆ	updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    15ÔåÆ		.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    16ÔåÆ		.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    17ÔåÆ		.notNull()
    18ÔåÆ});
    19ÔåÆ
    20ÔåÆexport const session = sqliteTable(
    21ÔåÆ	'session',
    22ÔåÆ	{
    23ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    24ÔåÆ		expiresAt: integer('expires_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' }).notNull(),
    25ÔåÆ		token: text('token').notNull().unique(),
    26ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    27ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    28ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    29ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    30ÔåÆ			.$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    31ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    32ÔåÆ		ipAddress: text('ip_address'),
    33ÔåÆ		userAgent: text('user_agent'),
    34ÔåÆ		userId: text('user_id')
    35ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    36ÔåÆ			.references(() => user.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' })
    37ÔåÆ	},
    38ÔåÆ	(table) => [index('session_userId_idx').on(table.userId)]
    39ÔåÆ);
    40ÔåÆ
    41ÔåÆexport const account = sqliteTable(
    42ÔåÆ	'account',
    43ÔåÆ	{
    44ÔåÆ		id: text('id').primaryKey(),
    45ÔåÆ		accountId: text('account_id').notNull(),
    46ÔåÆ		providerId: text('provider_id').notNull(),
    47ÔåÆ		userId: text('user_id')
    48ÔåÆ			.notNull()
    49ÔåÆ			.references(() => user.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    50ÔåÆ		accessToken: text('access_token'),
    51ÔåÆ		refreshToken: text('refresh_token'),
    52ÔåÆ		idToken: text('id_token'),
    53ÔåÆ		accessTokenExpiresAt: integer('access_token_expires_at', {
    54ÔåÆ			mode: 'timestamp_ms'
    55ÔåÆ		}),
    56ÔåÆ		refreshTokenExpiresAt: integer('refresh_token_expires_at', {
    57ÔåÆ			mode: 'timestamp_ms'
    58ÔåÆ		}),
    59ÔåÆ		scope: text('scope'),
    60ÔåÆ		password: text('password'),
    61ÔåÆ		createdAt: integer('created_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })
    62ÔåÆ			.default(sql`(cast(unixepoch('subsecond') * 1000 as integer))`)
    63ÔåÆ			.notNull(),
    64ÔåÆ		updatedAt: integer('updated_at', { mode: 'timestamp_ms' })

1ÔåÆ# 01 ÔÇö Systemarchitektur 2ÔåÆ 3ÔåÆ## Tech-Stack 4ÔåÆ 5ÔåÆ| Technologie | Zweck | 6ÔåÆ| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | 7ÔåÆ| **SvelteKit 2** | Meta-Framework, SSR, Routing, Remote Functions | 8ÔåÆ| **Svelte 5** | Reaktives UI-Framework (Runes: `$state`, `$derived`, `$effect`) | 9ÔåÆ| **Tailwind CSS 4** | Utility-first Styling via `@tailwindcss/vite` | 10ÔåÆ| **Bits UI / ShadCN** | Komponentenbibliothek in `src/lib/components/ui/` | 11ÔåÆ| **Drizzle ORM** | Typsicherer SQL-Query-Builder | 12ÔåÆ| **Turso (LibSQL)** | Serverlose SQLite-Datenbank | 13ÔåÆ| **better-auth** | Authentifizierung (Google OAuth + E-Mail/Passwort) | 14ÔåÆ| **SuperForms + Zod** | Serverseitige Formularvalidierung | 15ÔåÆ| **TanStack Table** | Datentabellen (`@tanstack/svelte-table`) | 16ÔåÆ| **i18next** | Internationalisierung (10 Sprachen, Lazy Loading) | 17ÔåÆ| **docx** | Word-Dokument-Generierung (.docx) | 18ÔåÆ| **Lucide** | Icons (`@lucide/svelte`) | 19ÔåÆ| **Bun** | Paketmanager und Runtime | 20ÔåÆ 21ÔåÆ--- 22ÔåÆ 23ÔåÆ## Datenmodell 24ÔåÆ 25ÔåÆ### Authentifizierung (better-auth ÔÇö bereits vorhanden) 26ÔåÆ 27ÔåÆ```typescript 28ÔåÆinterface User { 29ÔåÆ id: string; 30ÔåÆ name: string; 31ÔåÆ email: string; 32ÔåÆ emailVerified: boolean; 33ÔåÆ image: string | null; 34ÔåÆ createdAt: Date; 35ÔåÆ updatedAt: Date; 36ÔåÆ} 37ÔåÆ 38ÔåÆinterface Session { 39ÔåÆ id: string; 40ÔåÆ userId: string; 41ÔåÆ token: string; 42ÔåÆ expiresAt: Date; 43ÔåÆ} 44ÔåÆ``` 45ÔåÆ 46ÔåÆ### i18n 47ÔåÆ 48ÔåÆ```typescript 49ÔåÆtype SupportedLocale = 'de' | 'en' | 'fr' | 'es' | 'it' | 'nl' | 'pt' | 'pl' | 'ru' | 'tr'; 50ÔåÆ``` 51ÔåÆ 52ÔåÆ--- 53ÔåÆ 54ÔåÆ## Architektur-Muster (verbindlich) 55ÔåÆ 56ÔåÆ### 1. Datenpersistenz ÔÇö Remote Functions 57ÔåÆ 58ÔåÆAlle Daten werden serverseitig in Turso gespeichert. Zugriff ausschlie├ƒlich ├╝ber SvelteKit Remote Functions. **KEIN localStorage.** 59ÔåÆ 60ÔåÆ```typescript 61ÔåÆ// src/lib/rpc/auditoren.remote.ts 62ÔåÆimport { query, mutation } from '$app/server'; 63ÔåÆimport { db } from '$lib/server/db'; 64ÔåÆimport { auditors } from '$db/schema'; 65ÔåÆimport { eq } from 'drizzle-orm'; 66ÔåÆ 67ÔåÆ// Leseoperationen: query() 68ÔåÆexport const getAuditors = query(async () => { 69ÔåÆ return db.select().from(auditors); 70ÔåÆ}); 71ÔåÆ 72ÔåÆexport const getAuditorById = query(async (id: string) => { 73ÔåÆ return db.select().from(auditors).where(eq(auditors.id, id)); 74ÔåÆ}); 75ÔåÆ 76ÔåÆ// Schreiboperationen: mutation() 77ÔåÆexport const deleteAuditor = mutation(async (id: string) => { 78ÔåÆ await db.delete(auditors).where(eq(auditors.id, id)); 79ÔåÆ}); 80ÔåÆ``` 81ÔåÆ 82ÔåÆAufruf in Svelte-Komponenten: 83ÔåÆ 84ÔåÆ```svelte 85ÔåÆ 89ÔåÆ 90ÔåÆ{#await auditors} 91ÔåÆ

Laden...

92ÔåÆ{:then data} 93ÔåÆ 94ÔåÆ{:catch error} 95ÔåÆ

Fehler: {error.message}

96ÔåÆ{/await} 97ÔåÆ``` 98ÔåÆ 99ÔåÆ### 2. Formulare ÔÇö SuperForms + Zod 100ÔåÆ 101ÔåÆAlle Formulare verwenden SvelteKit Form Actions mit SuperForms + Zod: 102ÔåÆ 103ÔåÆ```typescript 104ÔåÆ// src/routes/(app)/auditor-neu/+page.server.ts 105ÔåÆimport { fail, message, superValidate } from 'sveltekit-superforms'; 106ÔåÆimport { zod4 } from 'sveltekit-superforms/adapters'; 107ÔåÆimport { z } from 'zod'; 108ÔåÆ 109ÔåÆconst auditorSchema = z.object({ 110ÔåÆ name: z.string().min(1, 'Name ist erforderlich'), 111ÔåÆ email: z.email('Ung├╝ltige E-Mail-Adresse'), 112ÔåÆ company: z.string().optional() 113ÔåÆ}); 114ÔåÆ 115ÔåÆexport const load = async () => { 116ÔåÆ const form = await superValidate(zod4(auditorSchema)); 117ÔåÆ return { form }; 118ÔåÆ}; 119ÔåÆ 120ÔåÆexport const actions = { 121ÔåÆ default: async (event) => { 122ÔåÆ const form = await superValidate(event, zod4(auditorSchema)); 123ÔåÆ if (!form.valid) return fail(400, { form }); 124ÔåÆ // DB-Operation... 125ÔåÆ return message(form, 'Auditor gespeichert!'); 126ÔåÆ } 127ÔåÆ}; 128ÔåÆ``` 129ÔåÆ 130ÔåÆ```svelte 131ÔåÆ 132ÔåÆ 144ÔåÆ 145ÔåÆ
146ÔåÆ 147ÔåÆ {#if $errors.name}{$errors.name}{/if} 148ÔåÆ 149ÔåÆ
150ÔåÆ``` 151ÔåÆ 152ÔåÆ### 3. Datentabellen ÔÇö TanStack Table 153ÔåÆ 154ÔåÆAlle Listen/Tabellen verwenden TanStack Table mit ShadCN-Styling: 155ÔåÆ 156ÔåÆ```svelte 157ÔåÆ 167ÔåÆ``` 168ÔåÆ 169ÔåÆ### 4. i18n ÔÇö i18next + i18nRune 170ÔåÆ 171ÔåÆLazy-Loading-Architektur mit custom Svelte 5 Rune: 172ÔåÆ 173ÔåÆ```typescript 174ÔåÆ// src/lib/i18n/i18n.svelte.ts 175ÔåÆimport i18next from 'i18next'; 176ÔåÆ 177ÔåÆexport class I18nRune { 178ÔåÆ locale = $state('de'); 179ÔåÆ ready = $state(false); 180ÔåÆ 181ÔåÆ async init() { 182ÔåÆ const de = await fetch('/locales/de.json').then((r) => r.json()); 183ÔåÆ await i18next.init({ lng: 'de', resources: { de: { translation: de } } }); 184ÔåÆ this.ready = true; 185ÔåÆ } 186ÔåÆ 187ÔåÆ async changeLocale(lang: SupportedLocale) { 188ÔåÆ if (!i18next.hasResourceBundle(lang, 'translation')) { 189ÔåÆ const data = await fetch(`/locales/${lang}.json`).then((r) => r.json()); 190ÔåÆ i18next.addResourceBundle(lang, 'translation', data); 191ÔåÆ } 192ÔåÆ await i18next.changeLanguage(lang); 193ÔåÆ this.locale = lang; 194ÔåÆ } 195ÔåÆ 196ÔåÆ t(key: string, params?: Record): string { 197ÔåÆ return i18next.t(key, params) ?? key; 198ÔåÆ } 199ÔåÆ} 200ÔåÆ``` 201ÔåÆ 202ÔåÆInitialisierung in Layout: 203ÔåÆ 204ÔåÆ```svelte 205ÔåÆ 206ÔåÆ 214ÔåÆ``` 215ÔåÆ 216ÔåÆVerwendung in Komponenten: 217ÔåÆ 218ÔåÆ```svelte 219ÔåÆ 225ÔåÆ 226ÔåÆ

{i18n.t('dashboard.title')}

{i18n.t('dashboard.totalAudits', { count: 42 })}

227ÔåÆ``` 228ÔåÆ 229ÔåÆ### i18n-Konvention f├╝r Enums/Typen 230ÔåÆ 231ÔåÆTypeScript-Union-Types verwenden **interne englische Keys**, nicht deutsche Anzeigetexte: 232ÔåÆ 233ÔåÆ```typescript 234ÔåÆ// RICHTIG ÔÇö interne Keys 235ÔåÆtype AuditStatus = 'planned' | 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'cancelled'; 236ÔåÆtype Priority = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'; 237ÔåÆ 238ÔåÆ// FALSCH ÔÇö deutsche Anzeigetexte als Typ-Werte 239ÔåÆtype AuditStatus = 'geplant' | 'in Bearbeitung' | 'abgeschlossen'; 240ÔåÆ``` 241ÔåÆ 242ÔåÆDie Anzeige erfolgt ├╝ber i18n-Lookup: 243ÔåÆ 244ÔåÆ```svelte 245ÔåÆ{i18n.t(`audit.status.${audit.status}`)} 246ÔåÆ 247ÔåÆ``` 248ÔåÆ 249ÔåÆLocale-Dateien unter `static/locales/`: 250ÔåÆ 251ÔåÆ```json 252ÔåÆ// static/locales/de.json 253ÔåÆ{ 254ÔåÆ "nav": { 255ÔåÆ "overview": "├£bersicht", 256ÔåÆ "dashboard": "Dashboard", 257ÔåÆ "auditorManagement": "Auditor-Verwaltung" 258ÔåÆ }, 259ÔåÆ "dashboard": { 260ÔåÆ "title": "Dashboard", 261ÔåÆ "totalAudits": "Gesamte Audits" 262ÔåÆ } 263ÔåÆ} 264ÔåÆ``` 265ÔåÆ 266ÔåÆ### 5. Shared State ÔÇö Svelte Context + Runes 267ÔåÆ 268ÔåÆ```typescript 269ÔåÆ// src/lib/state/settings.svelte.ts 270ÔåÆexport class SettingsState { 271ÔåÆ theme = $state('default'); 272ÔåÆ compactView = $state(false); 273ÔåÆ showNotifications = $state(true); 274ÔåÆ locale = $state('de'); 275ÔåÆ} 276ÔåÆ``` 277ÔåÆ 278ÔåÆInitialisierung in `(app)/+layout.svelte` mit `setContext('settings', new SettingsState())`. 279ÔåÆ 280ÔåÆ### 6. UI-Komponenten ÔÇö ShadCN-first 281ÔåÆ 282ÔåÆNeue Komponenten werden NICHT manuell erstellt. Stattdessen: 283ÔåÆ 284ÔåÆ```bash 285ÔåÆ# Standard ShadCN-Svelte Komponenten: 286ÔåÆbunx shadcn-svelte@next add dialog 287ÔåÆbunx shadcn-svelte@next add select 288ÔåÆbunx shadcn-svelte@next add checkbox 289ÔåÆbunx shadcn-svelte@next add table 290ÔåÆ 291ÔåÆ# Erweiterte Komponenten (shadcn-svelte-extras): 292ÔåÆbunx jsrepo add date-picker 293ÔåÆbunx jsrepo add multi-select 294ÔåÆ``` 295ÔåÆ 296ÔåÆ### 7. Navigation ÔÇö SvelteKit File-based Routing 297ÔåÆ 298ÔåÆ```svelte 299ÔåÆ 300ÔåÆDashboard 301ÔåÆAuditor-Verwaltung 302ÔåÆ 303ÔåÆ 304ÔåÆ 305ÔåÆ``` 306ÔåÆ 307ÔåÆProgrammatisch: `goto('/dashboard')` aus `$app/navigation`. 308ÔåÆAktiver Zustand: `$page.url.pathname` aus `$app/state`. 309ÔåÆ 310ÔåÆ### 8. Authentifizierung & Sicherheit 311ÔåÆ 312ÔåÆ**Auth-Guard in (app)/+layout.server.ts** ÔÇö sch├╝tzt ALLE App-Routen: 313ÔåÆ 314ÔåÆ```typescript 315ÔåÆ// src/routes/(app)/+layout.server.ts 316ÔåÆimport { redirect } from '@sveltejs/kit'; 317ÔåÆimport type { LayoutServerLoad } from './$types'; 318ÔåÆ 319ÔåÆexport const load: LayoutServerLoad = async ({ locals }) => { 320ÔåÆ if (!locals.user) { 321ÔåÆ redirect(302, '/login'); 322ÔåÆ } 323ÔåÆ return { user: locals.user }; 324ÔåÆ}; 325ÔåÆ``` 326ÔåÆ 327ÔåÆ**Organisation-basierte Mandantenf├ñhigkeit:** Benutzer geh├Âren zu einer Organisation (better-auth Organization Plugin). Alle Fachdaten geh├Âren der Organisation, nicht dem einzelnen Benutzer. So k├Ânnen mehrere Teammitglieder dieselben Auditoren, Audits, Pl├ñne etc. sehen. 328ÔåÆ 329ÔåÆJede Tabelle (au├ƒer Auth/Org-Tabellen) hat eine `organizationId`-Spalte: 330ÔåÆ 331ÔåÆ```typescript 332ÔåÆ// src/db/schema.ts 333ÔåÆimport { sqliteTable, text } from 'drizzle-orm/sqlite-core'; 334ÔåÆ 335ÔåÆexport const auditors = sqliteTable('auditors', { 336ÔåÆ id: text('id') 337ÔåÆ .primaryKey() 338ÔåÆ .$defaultFn(() => crypto.randomUUID()), 339ÔåÆ organizationId: text('organization_id').notNull(), // PFLICHT ÔÇö Org-Datenisolation 340ÔåÆ name: text('name').notNull(), 341ÔåÆ email: text('email').notNull() 342ÔåÆ // ... 343ÔåÆ}); 344ÔåÆ``` 345ÔåÆ 346ÔåÆ**Jede Query filtert nach organizationId:** 347ÔåÆ 348ÔåÆ```typescript 349ÔåÆexport const getAuditors = query(async () => { 350ÔåÆ const event = getRequestEvent(); 351ÔåÆ const orgId = event.locals.session!.activeOrganizationId; 352ÔåÆ return db.select().from(auditors).where(eq(auditors.organizationId, orgId)); 353ÔåÆ}); 354ÔåÆ``` 355ÔåÆ 356ÔåÆ**Form Actions pr├╝fen Auth:** 357ÔåÆ 358ÔåÆ```typescript 359ÔåÆexport const actions = { 360ÔåÆ default: async ({ locals, request }) => { 361ÔåÆ if (!locals.user) return fail(401, { message: 'Unauthorized' }); 362ÔåÆ // ... Formular verarbeiten 363ÔåÆ } 364ÔåÆ}; 365ÔåÆ``` 366ÔåÆ 367ÔåÆ**XSS-Schutz:** NIEMALS `{@html content}` ohne Sanitization. Verwende `isomorphic-dompurify`: 368ÔåÆ 369ÔåÆ```typescript 370ÔåÆimport DOMPurify from 'isomorphic-dompurify'; 371ÔåÆconst clean = DOMPurify.sanitize(userContent); 372ÔåÆ``` 373ÔåÆ 374ÔåÆ### 9. Fehlerbehandlung 375ÔåÆ 376ÔåÆ- Formularfehler: SuperForms `$errors` Objekt 377ÔåÆ- Benachrichtigungen: `toast.success()` / `toast.error()` aus `svelte-sonner` 378ÔåÆ- Best├ñtigungsdialoge: ShadCN `alert-dialog` Komponente (**NIEMALS** `window.confirm()`) 379ÔåÆ 380ÔåÆ### 9. Icons 381ÔåÆ 382ÔåÆ- UI-Icons: `@lucide/svelte` ÔÇö `import IconName from '@lucide/svelte/icons/icon-name'` 383ÔåÆ- App-Logos: `static/logo_dark.png`, `static/logo_light.png` 384ÔåÆ 385ÔåÆ### 10. Testing 386ÔåÆ 387ÔåÆ- Nur Logik testen: Remote Functions, Zod-Schemas, Utility-Funktionen 388ÔåÆ- KEINE Komponenten-Render-Tests (Svelte 5 Runes + jsdom = Probleme) 389ÔåÆ- Testdateien: `*.test.ts` neben der getesteten Datei 390ÔåÆ 391ÔåÆ--- 392ÔåÆ 393ÔåÆ## Projektstruktur 394ÔåÆ 395ÔåÆ``` 396ÔåÆsrc/ 397ÔåÆ routes/ 398ÔåÆ (auth)/login/ # Login-Seite 399ÔåÆ (app)/ 400ÔåÆ +layout.svelte # App-Layout (Header + Nav + Context-Setup) 401ÔåÆ +layout.server.ts # Auth-Guard, Settings laden 402ÔåÆ overview/ # ├£bersicht (Startseite) 403ÔåÆ dashboard/ # Dashboard 404ÔåÆ auditor-management/ # Auditorenverwaltung 405ÔåÆ add-auditor/ # Auditor hinzuf├╝gen/bearbeiten 406ÔåÆ search-manage/ # Suchen & Verwalten 407ÔåÆ calendar/ # Kalender 408ÔåÆ import-export/ # Import/Export 409ÔåÆ plan-generator/ # Auditplan-Generator 410ÔåÆ report-generator/ # Auditbericht-Generator 411ÔåÆ notes-generator/ # Auditnotizen-Generator 412ÔåÆ audit-questions/ # Auditfragen & Dokumente 413ÔåÆ action-plan/ # Ma├ƒnahmenplan 414ÔåÆ lib/ 415ÔåÆ components/ui/ # ShadCN Komponenten (via CLI installiert) 416ÔåÆ components/ # App-spezifische Komponenten 417ÔåÆ types/ # TypeScript Interfaces + Zod Schemas 418ÔåÆ rpc/ # Remote Functions (*.remote.ts) 419ÔåÆ server/db.ts # Drizzle Client 420ÔåÆ state/ # Shared State Klassen (*.svelte.ts) 421ÔåÆ i18n/ # i18nRune Implementation 422ÔåÆ data/ # Statische Wissensdatenbank 423ÔåÆ word/ # Word-Export Hilfsfunktionen 424ÔåÆ db/schema.ts # Drizzle Schema (alle Tabellen) 425ÔåÆstatic/ 426ÔåÆ locales/ # i18n JSON-Dateien 427ÔåÆ logo_dark.png # Dunkles App-Logo 428ÔåÆ logo_light.png # Helles App-Logo 429ÔåÆspecs/ # Feature-Spezifikationen (Deutsch) 430ÔåÆ``` 431ÔåÆ 432ÔåÆ## Abh├ñngigkeiten 433ÔåÆ 434ÔåÆ- **Alle Module (02-14) bauen auf dieser Architektur auf** 435ÔåÆ- **Externe Services:** Turso (DB), Google OAuth (Auth) 436ÔåÆ- **Patterns sind verbindlich:** Remote Functions, SuperForms, TanStack Table, i18nRune, ShadCN-first 437ÔåÆ

1ÔåÆ# Spec 06: Audit-Verwaltung (Audit-Suche & Verwaltung)

   124ÔåÆ
   125ÔåÆ## UI-Beschreibung
   126ÔåÆ
   127ÔåÆ### Layout
   128ÔåÆ
   129ÔåÆDie Seite gliedert sich in zwei Bereiche:
   130ÔåÆ
   131ÔåÆ1. **Suchleiste** (oberer Bereich, volle Breite)
   132ÔåÆ2. **Ergebnis-Grid / Formular** (darunter)
   133ÔåÆ
   134ÔåÆ### 1. Suchleiste
   135ÔåÆ
   136ÔåÆ- Ein einzelnes Textfeld (`<input type="text">`) mit Placeholder _"Audits durchsuchen... (Name, Auditor, Abteilung)"_.
   137ÔåÆ- Suche erfolgt in Echtzeit (Debounce 300 ms) per Server-Funktion.
   138ÔåÆ- Die Suche ist **case-insensitive** und durchsucht gleichzeitig die Spalten `auditName`, `abteilung` sowie den verknuepften Auditor-Namen.
   139ÔåÆ- Rechts neben dem Suchfeld: Button **"Neues Audit anlegen"** (primarer Button, Bits-UI `Button`).
   140ÔåÆ
   141ÔåÆ### 2. Suchergebnisse (Responsive Grid)
   142ÔåÆ
   143ÔåÆ- CSS-Grid: `grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr))`, Gap `1rem`.
   144ÔåÆ- Jede Karte (`Card` aus Bits-UI) zeigt:
   145ÔåÆ  - **Kopfzeile**: Auditname (fett), Status-Badge (farbkodiert, siehe unten).
   146ÔåÆ  - **Mitte**: Audittyp, Unternehmen, Abteilung, Zeitraum (Start- bis Enddatum).
   147ÔåÆ  - **Fusszeile**: Drei Aktions-Buttons:
   148ÔåÆ    - **Bearbeiten** (Stift-Icon) -- oeffnet das Formular mit vorausgefuellten Daten.
   149ÔåÆ    - **Loeschen** (Papierkorb-Icon) -- Bestaetigung per Dialog.
   150ÔåÆ    - **Dateien** (Bueroklammer-Icon) -- oeffnet Datei-Panel/Modal.
   151ÔåÆ
   152ÔåÆ**Status-Farbkodierung** (Tailwind-Klassen):
   153ÔåÆ
   154ÔåÆ| Status      | Hintergrund     | Text              |
   155ÔåÆ| ----------- | --------------- | ----------------- |
   156ÔåÆ| planned     | `bg-blue-100`   | `text-blue-800`   |
   157ÔåÆ| in_progress | `bg-yellow-100` | `text-yellow-800` |
   158ÔåÆ| completed   | `bg-green-100`  | `text-green-800`  |
   159ÔåÆ| cancelled   | `bg-red-100`    | `text-red-800`    |
   160ÔåÆ
   161ÔåÆ### 3. Audit-Formular (6 Sektionen)
   162ÔåÆ
   163ÔåÆDas Formular wird entweder in einem eigenen Bereich (unterhalb der Suche) oder in einem breitbildigen Modal angezeigt. Jede Sektion ist als zusammenklappbares Akkordeon (Bits-UI `Accordion`) implementiert.
   164ÔåÆ
   165ÔåÆ#### Sektion 1: Grundinformationen
   166ÔåÆ
   167ÔåÆ| Feld      | Typ                  | Pflicht | Hinweise                      |
   168ÔåÆ| --------- | -------------------- | ------- | ----------------------------- |
   169ÔåÆ| Auditname | `<input text>`       | Ja      | Min. 3 Zeichen                |
   170ÔåÆ| Audittyp  | `<Select>` (Bits-UI) | Ja      | 5 Optionen (siehe `AuditTyp`) |
   171ÔåÆ
   172ÔåÆ#### Sektion 2: Zeitplanung
   173ÔåÆ
   174ÔåÆ| Feld        | Typ            | Pflicht | Hinweise      |
   175ÔåÆ| ----------- | -------------- | ------- | ------------- |
   176ÔåÆ| Startdatum  | `<input date>` | Ja      |               |
   177ÔåÆ| Enddatum    | `<input date>` | Nein    | >= Startdatum |
   178ÔåÆ| Uhrzeit Von | `<input time>` | Nein    |               |
   179ÔåÆ| Uhrzeit Bis | `<input time>` | Nein    | > Uhrzeit Von |
   180ÔåÆ
   181ÔåÆ#### Sektion 3: Organisation & Standort
   182ÔåÆ
   183ÔåÆ| Feld        | Typ            | Pflicht | Hinweise                  |
   184ÔåÆ| ----------- | -------------- | ------- | ------------------------- |
   185ÔåÆ| Unternehmen | `<input text>` | Ja      |                           |
   186ÔåÆ| Abteilung   | `<input text>` | Ja      |                           |
   187ÔåÆ| Standort    | `<input text>` | Nein    |                           |
   188ÔåÆ| Format      | `<Select>`     | Nein    | Vor Ort / Remote / Hybrid |
   189ÔåÆ
   190ÔåÆ#### Sektion 4: Norm & Geltungsbereich
   191ÔåÆ
   192ÔåÆ- **5+1 ISO-Checkboxen**: Jede Norm als Bits-UI `Checkbox` mit Label.
   193ÔåÆ- **Geltungsbereich**: `<textarea>` (4 Zeilen).
   194ÔåÆ
   195ÔåÆ#### Sektion 5: Personal
   196ÔåÆ
   197ÔåÆ| Feld              | Typ                    | Pflicht | Hinweise                                |
   198ÔåÆ| ----------------- | ---------------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------- |
   199ÔåÆ| Leitender Auditor | `<Select>` (dynamisch) | Ja      | Optionen aus `auditors`-Tabelle geladen |
   200ÔåÆ| Auditteam         | `<textarea>`           | Nein    | Freitext, ein Name pro Zeile            |
   201ÔåÆ| Ansprechpartner   | `<input text>`         | Nein    |                                         |
   202ÔåÆ| Kontakt-E-Mail    | `<input email>`        | Nein    | E-Mail-Validierung                      |
   203ÔåÆ
   204ÔåÆ#### Sektion 6: Notizen & Dokumente
   205ÔåÆ
   206ÔåÆ| Feld            | Typ                     | Hinweise                                                  |
   207ÔåÆ| --------------- | ----------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
   208ÔåÆ| Notizen         | `<textarea>` (6 Zeilen) |                                                           |
   209ÔåÆ| Dokumente/Links | `<textarea>` (4 Zeilen) | Ein Link pro Zeile                                        |
   210ÔåÆ| Datei-Upload    | `<input type="file">`   | `multiple`, `accept` siehe erlaubte Typen, max 5 MB/Datei |
   211ÔåÆ
   212ÔåÆ**Erlaubte Dateitypen**: PDF (`.pdf`), Word (`.doc`, `.docx`), Excel (`.xls`, `.xlsx`), PowerPoint (`.ppt`, `.pptx`), Text (`.txt`), Bilder (`.png`, `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.gif`).
   213ÔåÆ
   214ÔåÆUnterhalb des Upload-Feldes: Liste bereits hochgeladener Dateien mit Dateiname, Groesse und Loeschen-Button.
   215ÔåÆ
   216ÔåÆ### Formular-Buttons
   217ÔåÆ
   218ÔåÆ- **Speichern** (primaer) -- Validierung, dann POST/PUT an Server.
   219ÔåÆ- **Abbrechen** (sekundaer) -- Formular schliessen, Aenderungen verwerfen.
   220ÔåÆ
   221ÔåÆ## Interaktionen
   222ÔåÆ
   223ÔåÆ### Suche
   224ÔåÆ
   225ÔåÆ1. Benutzer tippt in das Suchfeld.
   226ÔåÆ2. Nach 300 ms Debounce wird ein Server-Call (`searchAudits`) mit dem Suchbegriff ausgeloest.
   227ÔåÆ3. Server fuehrt eine SQL-Abfrage mit `LIKE '%suchbegriff%'` auf `auditName`, `abteilung` sowie einem JOIN auf `auditors.name` aus.
   228ÔåÆ4. Ergebnis wird als Array von `AuditRow` (inkl. Auditor-Name) zurueckgegeben.
   229ÔåÆ5. Das Grid rendert die Karten neu.
   230ÔåÆ
   231ÔåÆ### Audit anlegen
   232ÔåÆ
   233ÔåÆ1. Klick auf "Neues Audit anlegen".
   234ÔåÆ2. Formular oeffnet sich mit leeren Feldern (`istNeu = true`).
   235ÔåÆ3. Pflichtfelder sind markiert (rote Umrandung bei Fehler).
   236ÔåÆ4. Bei "Speichern": Client-Validierung -> Server-Call (`createAudit`).
   237ÔåÆ5. Dateien werden separat per `uploadAuditDatei` hochgeladen (Base64-Kodierung, Groessenpruefung client- und serverseitig).
   238ÔåÆ6. Bei Erfolg: Formular schliesst, Suchergebnisse aktualisieren.
   239ÔåÆ
   240ÔåÆ### Audit bearbeiten
   241ÔåÆ
   242ÔåÆ1. Klick auf "Bearbeiten" in einer Karte.
   243ÔåÆ2. Server-Call (`getAudit`) laedt den vollstaendigen Datensatz inkl. Dateien.
   244ÔåÆ3. Formular oeffnet sich vorausgefuellt (`istNeu = false`).
   245ÔåÆ4. Bei "Speichern": Server-Call (`updateAudit`).
   246ÔåÆ
   247ÔåÆ### Audit loeschen
   248ÔåÆ
   249ÔåÆ1. Klick auf "Loeschen".
   250ÔåÆ2. Bestaetigung per Bits-UI `AlertDialog`: _"Audit '{auditName}' wirklich loeschen? Alle zugehoerigen Dateien werden ebenfalls entfernt."_
   251ÔåÆ3. Bei Bestaetigung: Server-Call (`deleteAudit`), CASCADE loescht auch `audit_dateien`.
   252ÔåÆ4. Karte wird aus dem Grid entfernt.
   253ÔåÆ
   254ÔåÆ### Dateien anzeigen
   255ÔåÆ
   256ÔåÆ1. Klick auf "Dateien".
   257ÔåÆ2. Modal/Panel oeffnet sich mit Liste aller `AuditDateiRow` fuer diesen Audit.
   258ÔåÆ3. Pro Datei: Download-Button, Loeschen-Button.
   259ÔåÆ4. Neuer Upload moeglich direkt aus diesem Panel.
   260ÔåÆ
   261ÔåÆ### Validierung
   262ÔåÆ
   263ÔåÆ- Client-seitig: Pflichtfelder pruefen, E-Mail-Format, Dateigroesse (max 5 MB), Dateityp-Whitelist.
   264ÔåÆ- Server-seitig: Identische Pruefungen plus Auth-Check (`organizationId` muss mit Session uebereinstimmen).
   265ÔåÆ- Fehlermeldungen erscheinen inline unter dem jeweiligen Feld.
   266ÔåÆ
   267ÔåÆ## Abhaengigkeiten
   268ÔåÆ
   269ÔåÆ### Intern (Projekt)
   270ÔåÆ
   271ÔåÆ| Abhaengigkeit           | Beschreibung                                               |
   272ÔåÆ| ----------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
   273ÔåÆ| `auditors`-Tabelle      | Dynamisches Dropdown fuer "Leitender Auditor" (Sektion 5)  |
   274ÔåÆ| better-auth Session     | `organizationId` fuer alle CRUD-Operationen                |
   275ÔåÆ| Drizzle ORM Schema      | Tabellendefinitionen `audits`, `audit_dateien`, `auditors` |
   276ÔåÆ| Spec 07 (Kalender)      | Audits koennen als Kalendereintraege referenziert werden   |
   277ÔåÆ| Spec 08 (Import/Export) | Audits werden beim Export/Import beruecksichtigt           |
   278ÔåÆ
   279ÔåÆ### Extern (Bibliotheken)
   280ÔåÆ
   281ÔåÆ| Paket          | Verwendung                                             |
   282ÔåÆ| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
   283ÔåÆ| SvelteKit      | Routing (`/audits`), Server-Funktionen                 |
   284ÔåÆ| Svelte 5       | Reaktive Zustandsverwaltung (`$state`, `$derived`)     |
   285ÔåÆ| Bits-UI        | Select, Checkbox, Button, Card, AlertDialog, Accordion |
   286ÔåÆ| Tailwind CSS 4 | Styling, responsive Grid, Farbkodierung                |
   287ÔåÆ| Drizzle ORM    | SQL-Queries, Schema-Definition                         |
   288ÔåÆ| Turso          | SQLite-Datenbank (libsql)                              |
   289ÔåÆ| better-auth    | Authentifizierung, Session-Management                  |
   290ÔåÆ| Bun            | Runtime, Paketmanager                                  |
   291ÔåÆ

    83ÔåÆ## UI-Beschreibung
    84ÔåÆ
    85ÔåÆ### Layout
    86ÔåÆ
    87ÔåÆDie Kalenderseite besteht aus drei Bereichen:
    88ÔåÆ
    89ÔåÆ1. **Navigationsleiste** (oben)
    90ÔåÆ2. **Kalender-Grid** (Hauptbereich)
    91ÔåÆ3. **Eintrags-Modal** (Overlay)
    92ÔåÆ
    93ÔåÆ### 1. Navigationsleiste
    94ÔåÆ
    95ÔåÆHorizontale Leiste mit folgenden Elementen (von links nach rechts):
    96ÔåÆ
    97ÔåÆ- **Zurueck-Button** (`<` / Chevron Left) -- navigiert zum vorherigen Monat/Woche/Tag.
    98ÔåÆ- **Periodenbezeichnung** (zentriert, fett): z.B. _"Maerz 2026"_ (Monatsansicht), _"KW 12 - 16.03. - 22.03.2026"_ (Wochenansicht), _"Mittwoch, 18. Maerz 2026"_ (Tagesansicht).
    99ÔåÆ- **Weiter-Button** (`>` / Chevron Right) -- navigiert zum naechsten Monat/Woche/Tag.
   100ÔåÆ- **Heute-Button** (rechts) -- springt zur aktuellen Periode zurueck.

    33ÔåÆ// ÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉÔòÉ
